title: B4/B8 R163 VF2 comparison-policy shadow protocol

policies.source_f64: Use the source compare operands and source partial binary64 values recorded by R162.
policies.compensated_fsum: Reconstruct each operand's retained source leaf order and compare math.fsum values.
policies.exact_binary64_leaf: Compare exact rational sums of the retained binary64 leaf values; this is not an exact real-valued score oracle.
policies.tie_aware_1ulp: Compare exact retained-leaf sums, but return equality when the exact gap is at most one math.ulp of the larger source operand magnitude.

claim_boundary.what_is_supported: comparison-level arithmetic and tie-policy shadows over hash-bound R162 events
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: a changed mapping, production remedy, confirmed Qiskit bug, cross-platform theorem, hardware performance, route advantage, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit

requirements.label: the R162 result and all three worker files are hash-bound
the four comparison policies are fixed before execution
only uniquely reconstructable compare operands are retained
source-order leaf folding must reproduce each source operand bit pattern
all 256 R162 replays are read without replacement
source, compensated, exact, and tie-aware codes are retained per event
one-ULP tie behavior is explicit and deterministic
no Qiskit call, candidate selection, route change, simulation, or shot is performed
the upstream R162 claim boundary remains binding
bug, remedy, changed mapping, advantage, BQP, solved-frontier, and credit claims remain false
